name: agricultural_policy_cold_chain_millhaven_tru_loy
premise: A vendor outage and an internal change window collided; rollback paths are not symmetric and both teams blame the other. In Agricultural Policy, the situation tagged internally around agricultural policy cold chain millhaven tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Millhaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Frontline managers report that frontline staff are already deviating from policy; silence from the top will be read as tacit approval. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. The organization’s past incidents make truth feel morally loud today, while loyalty is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Arjun Navarro
agents.identity: I am Arjun Navarro, the accountable executive on this bridge in Agricultural Policy. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Elliot Mensah
agents.identity: I am Elliot Mensah, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Agricultural Policy. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so loyalty does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so truth does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Arjun Navarro must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Arjun Navarro do?
